name: lora_gateway_node_fixture_v1
description: Starter proof-pack manifest for the LoRa gateway node board-family benchmark fixture.

checks.name: requirements-present
checks.description: Requirements contract exists for the LoRa gateway node board-family fixture.

checks.name: golden-kicad-present
checks.description: Golden KiCad fixture files are present and hashable.

checks.name: manufacturing-export-manifest-present
checks.description: Manufacturing export bundle manifest is present and explicitly marked as non-fabrication evidence.

check_records.name: fixture-coverage
check_records.summary: Required starter fixture artifacts are committed for lora_gateway_node. This is coverage evidence only.

author: ZapTrace Core Team
limitations: Starter fixture coverage does not prove RF performance, LoRaWAN certification, regulatory compliance, antenna performance, electrical correctness, or manufacturability.
KiCad files in this fixture are hash fixtures for release workflow coverage, not a fabrication-ready board.
